generated_oml:
instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity hosting resource-specific functions and sensing/acting components"
    base:contains HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR, IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera, VedderElectronicSpeedController
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity processing sensor data and executing models"
    base:contains ROS2, NVIDIAJetpack, Python, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink, DataTranslationComponent, PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel, ACCComponent
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User Entity with interface components for interaction"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR sensor collecting ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected objects in proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HokuyoRawPointCloudData, HokuyoVehicleSpeedData, HokuyoSteeringAngleData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera collecting ego vehicle speed, steering angle, and detected objects in proximity"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IntelDepthCameraData, IntelVehicleSpeedData, IntelSteeringAngleData
]

instance HokuyoRawPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance HokuyoVehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance HokuyoSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LXLiDAR
]

instance IntelDepthCameraData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance IntelVehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance IntelSteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Object tracks derived from processed LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoRawPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationComponent
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HokuyoVehicleSpeedData, HokuyoSteeringAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data generated by ACC component"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ACCComponent
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationComponent
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking model applying DBSCAN and Kalman filter for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack, DataTranslationComponent
]

instance ACCComponent : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control component for lead vehicle detection and desired speed calculation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2, Python, CPlusPlus, MATLABSimulink
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 middleware for intra-component communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware-accelerated sensor processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python programming language for development and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComponent, PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for performance-critical components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComponent, PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for control algorithm design"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCComponent
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Data Translation component for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Data Monitoring service for real-time vehicle state visualization, projected driving path, detected object tracks, data saving, and report generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading service for ACC system functions to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, DesiredSpeedCalculationAction, ActuationCommandsAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management service enabling operator control and developer troubleshooting"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisableAction, SpeedSettingAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and detected objects"
]

instance DataSavingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saving object tracks and ego vehicle state to SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating operational reports from stored data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle for ACC system"
]

instance DesiredSpeedCalculationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Calculating following speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generating motor control commands for speed regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling or disabling ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedSettingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting target speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiating emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Vedder Electronic Speed Controller converting desired speed to motor voltage commands"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent for real-time vehicle state and object tracking display"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent for user input and command issuance"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands, including ACC inputs, motor actuation, and steering servo commands, are processed by the Controlling FE. The Data Translation component serializes and translates these commands, which are then transmitted via ROS2 and UDP over Wi-Fi networks. Command validation, authentication, and execution confirmation mechanisms are not detailed in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, as dictated by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with three primary entities (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User) mapped to hardware components. Each Functional Entity is implemented as a ROS2 package, with inter-component coordination via ROS2 nodes. The Physical Twin Entity deviates from ISO 23247 by encompassing general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) rather than only resource-specific OME functions, and all entities are deployed on separate hardware for system-wide coordination."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin System utilizes ROS2 for intra-component communication within the Digital Twin entity and Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer for inter-entity communication. Requirement R7 mandates a maximum network latency of 100 ms. Bandwidth requirements, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not explicitly detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity is deployed on separate hardware components, including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputers for processing and external storage devices for data persistence. No cloud, on-premise, or edge-specific deployment model is explicitly stated beyond the hardware details."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2:2021 reference architecture defining Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities handle specific tasks such as data transformation, actuation, and user interfacing, with OPC Unified Architecture specified for interoperability implementation."
]
